title: tiquilia canescens var. canescens
intro: Tiquilia canescens var. canescens, also known as Gray Pea Shrub, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, characterized by its grayish stems and leaves. Traditionally used in folk medicine, Tiquilia canescens var. canescens has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable resource for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Tiquilia canescens var. canescens can be made into teas, infusions, or salves to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
